results.title: Welsh pop star Bonnie Tyler dies at 75
results.description: Bonnie Tyler, the Grammy-nominated Welsh pop star whose 1983 chart-topping power ballad "Total Eclipse of the Heart" enchanted succeeding generations during solar and lunar eclipses, has died. She was 75.

results.title: Remember 'Ramayana: The Legend of Prince Rama'? Here's Where You Can Watch It Now
results.description: The Indo-Japanese animated film, Ramayana: The Legend of Prince Rama, has long been regarded as one of the finest adaptations of the Hindu epic.
